_doc: Read-verified + adversarially-confirmed element-id -> data source binds, and UI-chrome exclusions, for Phase B.2 of the interactive-lineage roadmap. Produced by the lineage-anchor-resolve workflow + a deterministic grep backstop (element-id AND claimed source must literally appear in the page). Consumed by tools/resolve_display_anchors.py, classify_display_ladder.py, build_display_provenance.py.

achievements.html|ac-card-level.what: Total-level card: sum of current_level across all 12 achievement domains for the signed-in worker (max 1,200).

achievements.html|hero-tier-label.what: Hero tier badge label: worker's tier (e.g. 'Senior Technician') derived from their top achievement level.

achievements.html|ac-verdict-label.what: Plain-Read verdict headline interpreting weekly XP / active-domain pace (e.g. 'NN XP this week — solid pace', 'No achievements yet').

alert-hub.html|anomaly-engine-count.what: Top-5 Anomaly Engine signal-count badge (e.g. '5 signals'); the count is the size of the fused-anomaly list, not an aggregate

alert-hub.html|amc-stat-assets.what: AMC daily-brief 'High Risk' stat tile — count of high-risk assets in today's brief

alert-hub.html|amc-stat-crew.what: AMC daily-brief 'Crew' stat tile — count of crew alerts in today's brief

alert-hub.html|amc-stat-parts.what: AMC daily-brief 'Parts' stat tile — count of parts at risk / to stage in today's brief

alert-hub.html|amc-stat-pms.what: AMC daily-brief 'PMs Due' stat tile — count of PMs due in today's brief

analytics.html|an-verdict-label.what: Plain-read reliability verdict ('need action' / 'climbing' / 'healthy' / 'not enough data') derived from OEE, worst-MTBF and PM-compliance.

asset-hub.html|ah-card-total.what: Hero count of approved assets registered in this hive.

asset-hub.html|detail-level.what: Asset hierarchy level (e.g. equipment) shown in the asset detail header.

asset-hub.html|pf-pf-days.what: P-F interval (days from potential-failure detection to functional failure) for the selected condition parameter.

asset-hub.html|risk-days.what: Predicted days until failure for the asset (from the risk model).

asset-hub.html|risk-score-num.what: Reliability-risk score shown as a percentage in the asset risk card.

asset-hub.html|ah-verdict-label.what: Composed status verdict sentence (e.g. 'N assets tracked, M marked critical' / 'N submissions awaiting approval') for the asset fleet.

asset-hub.html|pending-assets-count.what: Count of pending (and rejected) asset submissions in the supervisor approval queue.

community.html|mod-count.what: Mod-queue badge count = number of flagged posts

community.html|presence-bar.what: Live roster of teammates currently online

dayplanner.html|dp-verdict-label.what: Plain-Read verdict headline for the day plan (e.g. 'Day plan looks manageable', 'N items overdue', 'No plan yet').

dayplanner.html|sidebar-count-bar.what: Capacity bar whose width visualizes the count of open logbook items in the sidebar.

dayplanner.html|sidebar-count-label.what: Text label '{N} open item(s) from Logbook' in the sidebar header.

founder-console.html|ring-pct-num.what: Validator pass percentage shown as the big number inside the health ring (e.g. "87%").

founder-console.html|ring-pct-label.what: Health-ring status label ('All clear' / 'Attention' / 'Action needed') derived from the validator pass %.

hive.html|adoption-risk-score.what: Numeric adoption-risk score (0-100) for the hive, or '--' when no snapshot exists.

hive.html|presence-bar.what: Live chips of workers currently online in the hive (Supabase Realtime presence).

hive.html|ss-verdict-label.what: Supervisor verdict headline summarizing hive health across logbook, PM scope, inventory and adoption risk

hive.html|welcome-log-count.what: Count of all logbook entries by the current worker (welcome screen).

hive.html|welcome-parts-count.what: Count of CLOSED logbook entries by the current worker (welcome screen).

integrations.html|it-verdict-label.what: Headline integrations verdict label (e.g. 'N integrations stale', 'N CMMS integrations healthy', 'No integrations configured yet')

integrations.html|preview-count-label.what: Count of valid rows to import from the selected file

inventory.html|stat-total.what: Total parts count pill — shows items.length, the number of inventory items in the current scope.

inventory.html|inv-count-label.what: Pagination label 'Showing N of M parts' — visible.length / filtered.length of inventory items.

inventory.html|inv-verdict-label.what: Plain-Read stock-health verdict headline (e.g. 'Stock is healthy', 'N parts out of stock') classifying inventory state.

logbook.html|logbook-count-label.what: Count caption 'Showing N of M entries' for the logbook feed

logbook.html|machine-count.what: Distinct machine count in the header stat pills (worker's own entries)

logbook.html|offline-queue-count.what: Count of entries queued offline awaiting sync

logbook.html|open-count.what: Open-entries count in the header stat pills (head COUNT query)

logbook.html|open-jobs-count.what: Open-jobs badge ('N open job(s)') on the open-jobs panel

logbook.html|pm-tasks-count.what: Inline PM-tasks header count ('N need(s) attention' / 'All tasks on track')

logbook.html|total-count.what: Total-entries count in the header stat pills (head COUNT query)

marketplace-seller.html|ps-earned.what: Seller's total PHP earned: sum of (price * 0.95, i.e. net of 5% platform fee) over orders with status 'released'.

marketplace.html|mk-card-total.what: Total count of published listings in the active section after filters, shown as the hero number on the 'total' summary card.

marketplace.html|quality-bar.what: Width (and color) of the listing-quality progress bar in the Post form, driven by a 0-100 quality score computed live from the form fields.

marketplace.html|quality-score-num.what: Numeric listing-quality score shown as 'NN / 100' beside the quality bar in the Post form.

marketplace.html|mk-verdict-label.what: Plain-read verdict headline summarizing the listing population, e.g. 'N listings · M of them yours' / 'N {section} listings live'.

ph-intelligence.html|ph-verdict-label.what: Verdict headline for the latest regional PH intelligence report (e.g. 'No regional data yet', 'Report is thin or aging', '5-plant report, 12d old').

platform-health.html|health-num.what: Composite platform health score (0-100) shown as the big number in the header ring.

platform-health.html|health-label.what: Health band label (Healthy / Review / Action) derived from the composite score.

platform-health.html|streak-num.what: Consecutive clean validator runs (0 FAIL, 0 regressions)

pm-scheduler.html|pm-count-label.what: Shows 'Showing N of M assets' — the count of visible vs. filtered PM assets.

pm-scheduler.html|pm-verdict-label.what: Plain-read verdict headline (e.g. 'PM compliance is healthy (88%)', 'PM compliance is in the red') driven by SMRP 2.1.1 compliance %, overdue count, and total.

predictive.html|pr-verdict-label.what: Plain-Read verdict headline (e.g. 'Fleet risk is high' / 'Fleet is healthy')

predictive.html|trend-label.what: MTBF/failure-trend caption text under the weekly failure bars

project-manager.html|pm-verdict-label.what: Plain-read project-health verdict headline (e.g. '3 active projects, none overdue' / 'N projects past end date')

shift-brain.html|risk-count.what: Count of top-risk assets flagged for this shift window.

shift-brain.html|pms-count.what: Count of preventive-maintenance tasks due in this shift window.

shift-brain.html|carry-count.what: Count of open carry-forward items from the prior shift.

shift-brain.html|parts-count.what: Count of low-stock parts to pre-stage for this shift.

shift-brain.html|sb-verdict-label.what: Overall shift-readiness verdict (e.g. 'Heavy shift - prioritize hot assets and carry-forward').

skillmatrix.html|result-score.reads: client-side exam grading (answers vs answer key)
skillmatrix.html|result-score.what: Exam result score (X / 10) after submitting a quiz

skillmatrix.html|sm-verdict-label.what: Skill-matrix verdict headline summarizing discipline progress vs targets

voice-journal.html|entry-count.what: Shows the count of journal entries currently displayed (e.g. '12 entries'), reflecting the active language filter + search.

_phantom.note: Confirmed: this id does not exist in the DOM or JS. First-pass classification (kind=unknown, no source, no render site) is correct. The plain-language next-step now lives only in the 'What to do next' action card (ah-action-text).
